qa_pairs.question: What is the primary purpose of the instructions provided on this page?
qa_pairs.answer: This page provides instructions on how to set up and access Arbutus object storage using WinSCP, which is one of the object storage clients available for this storage type.

qa_pairs.question: What are the initial configuration settings required in WinSCP to connect to Arbutus object storage?
qa_pairs.answer: When configuring a "New Session" in WinSCP for Arbutus object storage, you must set the "File protocol" to Amazon S3, the "Host name" to `object-arbutus.alliancecan.ca`, the "Port number" to 443, and the "Access key ID" to your unique `20_DIGIT_ACCESS_KEY`.

qa_pairs.question: What crucial advanced setting must be changed in WinSCP for it to correctly work with Arbutus object storage, and why is it important?
qa_pairs.answer: It is crucial to change the "URL style:" setting from "Virtual Host" to "Path." This setting is found by navigating through "Edit" > "Advanced..." > "Environment" > "S3" > "Protocol options." This change is vital because without it, WinSCP will not function and will display hostname resolution errors.
